context: User has a misconfigured global vs project-level permission issue.

checklist.name: Identifies global config bleed problem
checklist.description: Explains that global config applies to ALL projects, not just the intended one

checklist.name: Recommends project-level opencode.json
checklist.description: Suggests moving the permission to the project-root `opencode.json` instead of global config

checklist.name: Removes from global config
checklist.description: Explains to remove the deploy command from `~/.config/opencode/opencode.json`

checklist.name: Shows correct project config
checklist.description: Shows the correct JSON structure for project-scoped bash permission
